info.title: WebWaka OS v4 Platform API
info.description:
The WebWaka OS v4 Open API — a vendor-neutral, offline-first, Africa-native SaaS Operating System. All endpoints support multi-tenancy and JWT-based RBAC.

**Base URL:** `https://api.webwaka.io/v4`

**Auth:** Bearer JWT (issued by `/auth/token`).

post.description: Exchange credentials for a signed JWT access token and refresh token.

post.description: Vendor-neutral AI text completion via CORE-5 abstraction layer. Routes to the best available model (OpenRouter → Llama-3 local fallback).

400.description: Bad Request — invalid parameters or request body

429.description: Too Many Requests — rate limit exceeded

400.description: Bad Request — invalid parameters or request body

400.description: Bad Request — invalid parameters or request body

429.description: Too Many Requests — rate limit exceeded

BearerAuth.description: Tenant JWT issued by webwaka-core auth middleware. Tokens comply with RFC8725 (JSON Web Token Best Current Practices): short-lived (15m access / 7d refresh), signed with RS256, audience-restricted to the issuing tenant slug, and rotated on every refresh.

TenantKey.name: X-Tenant-Key
TenantKey.description: Tenant API key for server-to-server calls

PublicEndpoint.description: No authentication required. This endpoint is intentionally public (token issuance).

None.name: X-No-Auth-Required
None.description: Marker scheme for intentionally public endpoints (e.g. auth/token, auth/refresh). No key required.

price.description: Price in kobo (NGN), pesewas (GHS), or cents (KES)

details.error: Must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed in the current window

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Remaining requests in the current window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: UNIX timestamp when the current window resets

Retry-After.description: Seconds until you can retry the request
